$description:
Font registry — declares how every font family is sourced across platforms.

source values:
  google-fonts  → loaded via the google_fonts Flutter package / Google Fonts CDN on web
  system        → pre-installed on the target OS (no download needed)
  asset         → bundled in the app's assets (add to pubspec.yaml / vite config)
  custom-cdn    → loaded from a non-Google CDN; supply url field

This file is the single source of truth. The generator reads it and produces:
  packages/tokens-dart/lib/src/typography/font_registry.dart   (BTechFontRegistry)
  packages/tokens-web/src/typography/font-registry.ts           (fontRegistry + buildGoogleFontsUrl)
  packages/tokens-web/dist/styles.css                           (@import prepended automatically)

Do not add raw font-family values here — those live in tokens/core/font.primitive.json.
This file only describes loader metadata for fonts already referenced in token files.

Inter.$description: Default sans-serif — all tenants unless overridden.

JetBrains Mono.$description: Default monospace — code blocks, token paths.

Roboto.$description: Android system sans-serif — commonly used as a Google Fonts fallback.

Google Sans.$description: Proprietary Google brand font — pre-installed on Android, not in google_fonts package. Falls back to Roboto on other platforms.

Poppins.$description: Geometric sans-serif — available for tenant overrides.

Nunito.$description: Rounded sans-serif — available for tenant overrides.

Noto Sans.$description: Broad Unicode coverage — use for multi-language tenants.

Bitcount Grid Double.$description: Tenant BJB display font — decorative variable font by Underware, available on Google Fonts.
